name: Suspicious Kerberos RC4 Ticket Encryption
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Kerberos RC4 Ticket Encryption
SIGMA Description: Detects service ticket requests using RC4 encryption type

False positives:
- Service accounts used on legacy systems (e.g. NetApp)
- Windows Domains with DFL 2003 and legacy systems

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4769 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x40810000%' AND "Ticket Encryption Type"='0x17') AND (NOT(LOWER("Service Name") LIKE '%$')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Kerberos RC4 Ticket Encryption on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4769 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x40810000%' AND "Ticket Encryption Type"='0x17') AND (NOT(LOWER("Service Name") LIKE '%$')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Kerberos RC4 Ticket Encryption
